message:
feat(interactive,agent,config): async Kimi OAuth, theme picker caching, session index offloading, and config error surfacing

Interactive OAuth (interactive/commands.rs, interactive/agent.rs, interactive.rs):
- Convert Kimi-for-coding OAuth device flow from blocking
  futures::executor::block_on to async task spawned on runtime_handle,
  preventing TUI freeze during network roundtrip
- Add PiMsg::OAuthDeviceFlowStarted variant to relay device flow
  parameters (provider, device_code, user_code, verification_uri,
  expires_in) from async task back to the TUI event loop
- Add PiMsg handler in agent.rs that displays the OAuth prompt message,
  sets pending_oauth state, and focuses input for Enter-to-continue

Theme picker (interactive/state.rs, interactive/view.rs):
- Change ThemePickerItem::File from File(PathBuf) to File { path, name }
  to cache the resolved theme name at discovery time instead of loading
  the JSON file on every render frame
- Load theme name once in ThemePickerOverlay::new() with graceful
  fallback to file_stem
- Simplify view.rs match arm to use the pre-cached name

Agent extensions (agent.rs):
- Clear extension region, extension manager, queue mode mirrors, and
  injected queue when enable_extensions receives empty spec lists,
  preventing stale extension state from prior configurations from
  leaking across reconfigurations
- Update test to verify clearing behavior by injecting dummy state
  before calling enable_extensions with empty list

Session index (session_index.rs):
- Offload enqueue_session_index_snapshot_update to a background thread
  via std::thread::spawn to avoid blocking the caller on SQLite I/O

Config error surfacing (main.rs):
- Propagate errors from list_packages_blocking() and
  collect_config_packages() via ? instead of silently defaulting to
  empty, ensuring malformed package settings produce user-visible errors
- Update collect_config_packages to return Result<Vec<...>>
- Add E2E tests verifying that invalid package JSON in project settings
  produces exit code 1 with "Invalid JSON in settings file" on stderr
  for both --show and plain config modes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
